name: Oberoi Sky Heights
description: A spectacular penthouse perched above Mumbai's iconic skyline. Floor to ceiling windows, a private terrace overlooking the Arabian Sea, and interiors crafted by award winning designers.

name: The Lutyens Mansion
description: A grand colonial mansion in Delhi's most prestigious address. Sprawling gardens, a private pool, and timeless architecture that blends heritage with modern luxury.

name: Prestige Lakefront
description: A serene lakefront villa in Bangalore's most coveted neighbourhood. Private dock, infinity pool and lush landscaped gardens that bring nature right to your doorstep.

name: Banjara Pearl Residences
description: Atop Hyderabad's most sought after tower, this penthouse offers wraparound views of the city, a private chef's kitchen and smart home automation throughout.

name: ECR Beachfront Estate
description: A breathtaking beachfront estate on Chennai's East Coast Road. Private beach access, a resort style pool and interiors finished in rare Italian marble throughout.

name: Koregaon Park Townhouse
description: A beautifully designed townhouse in Pune's most vibrant neighbourhood. Tree lined streets, proximity to the city's best cafes and a warm community atmosphere.
